tool.name: enzbert
tool.description: Transformer-based model that predicts the functional annotation of enzymes from protein sequences

validator.message: No models are available. Please ask the admin of the Galaxy instance to install models.

tool.help:
Enzbert is a transformer-based model that predicts the functional annotation of enzymes from protein sequences.
Enzbert inputs are: - The model to use: EnzBert_SwissProt_2021_04, EnzBert_EC40 or EnzBert_ECPred40 - The file containing the fasta sequences - The maximum sequence size, by default 2048 (This can prevent an Out Of Memory error when dealing with very long sequences. If the fasta file contains a sequence that exceeds this number, the job will fail) - The number of predictions per sequence
Enzbert output is a table with the prediction containg the sequence id, the predicted EC number associated with the probability and class weight.
